caption: A man wearing a purple traditional cap, glasses, and a white garment is positioned against a dark background. A logo for "plustv" is visible in the upper left of each scene. Below the man, a banner reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". At the bottom of the display, a white bar contains text. In the initial scene, the text on the left says "WATCH ONLINE" and the right side displays "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA/LIVE-TV". In the subsequent scenes, the left text changes to "SUBSCRIBE" while the right side updates to "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static pose with a neutral expression, and the overall visual composition remains consistent except for the changing text in the bottom bar.
